Sandra Kim

Of Counsel

Chicago

Profile

Sandra Kim is of counsel in the Chicago office of Crestview Morrison LLP. She focuses her practice on environmental regulatory compliance and sustainability advisory.

Practice Areas

  • Environmental Law
  • Regulatory Compliance
  • Sustainability Advisory
